---
title: "Newsletter"
date: last-modified
execute:   
  freeze: auto  # re-render only when source changes
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    highlight-style: pygments
tbl-colwidths: [40, 15, 20, 15]
---


- [3rd March 2025](methods/20250304_news.html)
- [14th February 2026](methods/20260214_achievements2025.html)
- [12th June 2026](methods/20260612_news.html)
